Main
• Spot VLCC Rate Jump as Uncertainty Increases - In the lead-up to Easter holidays, VLCC spot freight rates on the Middle East Gulf - China route experienced a notable firming trend, with rates rising sharply on April 17 to one-month highs. This tightening in the freight market was driven by a combination of pre-holiday cargo demand and speculative activity linked to renewed U.S. These proposed and implemented sanctions have strained global supply chains, prompting Asian refiners to diversify sourcing strategies.
